neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.integrated.ReservoirDrive

neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.integrated
 

  • Uses of ReservoirDrive in neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.integrated

    Classes in neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.integrated that implement ReservoirDrive
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AquiferDrive
    Gas-reservoir drive with steady-state aquifer water influx (Fetkovich-style support).
    class 
    MaterialBalanceGasDrive
    Volumetric (depletion) gas-reservoir drive based on the p/z material balance.
    class 
    OilTankDrive
    Undersaturated oil-reservoir depletion drive based on a single-tank compressibility balance.

    Description

    IntegratedProductionModel.addWell(String wellName, ReservoirDrive drive, WellDeliverabilityCurve curve)
